title: tricalysia abnormis
intro: Tricalysia abnormis is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the coffee bush due to its coffee-like properties. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tricalysia abnormis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Tricalysia abnormis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by extracting the essential oils from the plant for use in aromatherapy and other applications.
